proven.claim: Proven: current iteration index i satisfies 0 <= i < contract.violations.length.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; Proven: current iteration index i satisfies 0 <= i < contract.violations.length.
; for-of initialises i = 0 and increments only while i < array.length.
; Precondition + loop invariant + negation → expect unsat.
(declare-const violations_length Int)
(declare-const i Int)
; Path condition
(assert (> violations_length 0))
; Loop invariant lower bound: i starts at 0
(assert (>= i 0))
; Loop invariant upper bound: loop exits when i reaches violations_length
(assert (< i violations_length))
; Negation: index is out of bounds
(assert (or (< i 0) (>= i violations_length)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — index is always in bounds inside the for-of loop body
